PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristen Bargmeyer appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court noted that it has waivers of notice from St. Dominic's and Old Saint Mary's Cathedral. The Court waives defect in notice of the amendment. No one was present to object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court will grant the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated August 7, 2001 is admitted to probate. John Steczynski is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Status on close of estate is set for July 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Bargmeyer questions why the Court is ordering a bond in the amount of $1,562,000.00. Discussion was held regarding the value of the estate assets. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission for the Court to determine an appropriate amount of bond.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
